name: codex-control-center
description: A file-backed control center for project-scoped Codex Agent task orchestration.

scripts.check: node scripts/run-core-flow.mjs --check && node scripts/run-cli-smoke.mjs && node scripts/run-stale-context-smoke.mjs && node scripts/run-concurrency-smoke.mjs && node scripts/run-project-status-smoke.mjs && node scripts/run-project-check-smoke.mjs && node scripts/run-import-smoke.mjs && node scripts/run-web-smoke.mjs
